subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification, in their loftier station, belong to the divine chosen ones and pure-hearted saints, who from a single particle of His effulgent manifestations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا در رتبه اخری مخصوص اولیا و اصفیای الهی است که یک ذره از تجلیات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
